name: Farm Style Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 (17 oz) can whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle beef with salt, pepper, paprika, and seasoned salt.
2. Place in slow-cooking pot with zucchini; pour hot water and steak sauce over.
3. Cover and cook on low for 7 to 9 hours or until tender.
4. Turn control to high.
5. Stir in corn.
6. Dissolve cornstarch in cold water; add to meat mixture.
7. Cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes.
